_comment: Machine-readable subset of tasks/design-judgment.md. `expect` = substrings a correct answer must contain (keyword grader). `_demo_answer` is a canned correct answer so the harness runs green in CI; replace the responder with a real model to grade live.

tasks.input: Agent that returns sentiment (positive/negative) for a text blob.
tasks._demo_answer: No agent needed — a single LLM call (or classifier) suffices; start simple.

tasks.input: 8 overlapping data-fetch tools, agent picks the wrong one. Split into more agents?
tasks._demo_answer: Consolidate the overlapping tools first; the problem is tool overlap, not agent count.

tasks.input: Same agent gathers sources and rates its own confidence.
tasks._demo_answer: Add an independent verifier (C2); the producer must not certify its own output.

tasks.input: Tool returns last cached value silently when the API fails.
tasks._demo_answer: Surface a data_quality flag and mark it stale; never silently fall back (C4).

tasks.input: Agent should place trades automatically once confident.
tasks._demo_answer: Gate the irreversible action behind a human (C12); confidence is not authorization.
